zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Heaton於1268年出生在英國藍卡爾希頓時，他的父親Ellis de Heton30歲，母親Mrs Ellis De Heton31歲。他於1287年與Mrs John de Heaton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1334年在英國藍卡爾享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hēah ‘high’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’: Heaton (Yorkshire, Northumberland); Heaton Norris, Heaton under Horwich, Heaton with Oxcliffe, Great Heaton, Little Heaton (all Lancashire); Capheaton, Kirkheaton (Northumberland); Cleckheaton, Hanging Heaton, Kirkheaton (Yorkshire). This surname was taken to Ireland in the mid 17th century, and within Ireland is now mainly found in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Heaton was born in 1268, in Heaton, Lancashire, England, his father, Ellis de Heton, was 30 and his mother, Mrs Ellis De Heton, was 31. He married Mrs John de Heaton in 1287, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1334, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 66.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Heaton(이)가 1268년 영국 랭카실르 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ellis de Heton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Ellis De Heton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1287년 영국에서 Mrs John de Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1334년 영국 랭카실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Heaton родился в 1268 г. в местности хитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ellis de Heton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Ellis De Heton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs John de Heaton в 1287 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1334 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.
